productName: Green Reaper Live Resin Badder - Acapulco Gold - 1g
description: Aromatic sativa live resin pressed from fresh-frozen Acapulco Gold, the sweet spot of flavor, potency, and that 'just-harvested' terpene rush. Full-spectrum and bursting with terps, with notes of honey, chestnut, and coffee, delivering a bright, heady lift.
